summary: Frontend-only testing (iteration 2) of the restructured 4-tab Podcast Player (Search/Latest/Playlist/Settings) on mobile viewport 390x844 against preview URL. All core flows verified end-to-end via Playwright: tab presence/order, search + inline subscribe toggle, Latest aggregation + refresh, empty Playlist + docked player controls, Settings storage segment + skip chips persistence, and navigation to /podcast/[id] from a search result. No crashes, no red screen, no console errors (only a benign deprecated prop warning for pointerEvents).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - pointerEvents is passed as a View prop but should be on style per RN 0.76+. Cosmetic only, not blocking.

action_items: Optional: Move `pointerEvents: 'box-none'` from the inline style object into the actual View style prop directly (it is currently inside the style array, so the warning is likely being emitted by a nested component using the prop form). Low priority - non-blocking warning only.
critical_code_review_comments: Preview URL in the review_request (64c18718-...) does NOT match the one actually configured in /app/frontend/.env (pod-stream-2.preview.emergentagent.com). Testing used the env URL which is the correct source of truth.

app/_layout.tsx GlobalMiniPlayer only treats '/', '/search', '/downloads' as tab routes for bottomOffset, but new tabs are index/latest/playlist/settings. The conditional should include '/latest', '/playlist', '/settings' instead of the stale '/search', '/downloads' - mini player offset will be wrong on Latest/Playlist/Settings routes if it becomes visible.

playlist.tsx imports `expo-file-system/legacy` which is fine on native but throws on web when deleteAsync is called. Currently only called inside Alert.alert callback (also web no-op), so safe in practice, but worth noting.
seed_data_creation: No backend seed data. During test, subscribed to 2 podcasts via Search tab which were persisted to AsyncStorage (cleared on reload).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified tab order=[Search,Latest,Playlist,Settings]; testIDs confirmed: search-input, subscribe-btn-<id> (30 buttons on a 'tech' search), search-result-<id> rows navigate to /podcast/[id]?feedUrl=...&name=...; latest-refresh-btn works, latest-episode-<id> long-press dispatches without crash, 20 episodes aggregated+sorted from 2 subscriptions; playlist empty state 'No downloads yet' renders, dock controls present: playlist-play-pause/skip-back/skip-forward/prev/next/slider/rate; settings segment storage-internal (active) / storage-sdcard (correctly marked unsupported on web with hint text), skip-forward-<n>/skip-backward-<n> chips persist selection and reflect in playlist skip labels. Use EXPO_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env=https://pod-stream-2.preview.emergentagent.com (NOT the URL in review_request).
